title: Harvest Moon

tournament_modes.name: Gold Rush — Most money in Year 1
tournament_modes.description: Players race to accumulate the most gold (G) by the end of in-game Year 1 (Spring Y1 to Winter Y4). Single player each, compare final totals.
tournament_modes.note: Year 1 = 4 seasons × 30 days = 120 in-game days. Roughly 30–60 min real time depending on play speed.

tournament_modes.name: One Season Sprint — Most gold after Spring Y1
tournament_modes.description: Spring only (30 days). Plant turnips on Day 1, ship everything before Day 30. Fastest to accumulate wins.
tournament_modes.note: Very quick format, good for live event side-game or warmup.

addresses.name: gold_lo
addresses.note: Gold is stored as 3 bytes at 0x1F04–0x1F06 (little-endian 24-bit). Combine for full value.

addresses.name: gold_combined
addresses.description: Player gold — full value (read as uint24 LE: 0x1F04 + 0x1F05<<8 + 0x1F06<<16)
addresses.note: From AR code 7E1F04/05/06. SNES bank 7E = WRAM. Verify via memory viewer.

addresses.name: day
addresses.note: From AR day modifier code. Exact offset TBD — verify live.

addresses.name: season
addresses.note: Estimated — near day address. Needs live verification.

addresses.name: year
addresses.note: Estimated — near season/day block. Needs live verification.

tournament_notes: Single-player game — tournament format is parallel sessions (two players, same starting conditions, compare gold at end of season/year)
Best format: Spring Y1 sprint — plant turnips Day 1, ship by Day 28, compare gold on Day 30
Hardcore format: full Year 1 run — requires trust/honor system or screen recording
Entry fee held in Fiber channel, released to highest-gold player at agreed checkpoint
Gold display: top of screen in-game. Easily readable for live streaming.
IMPORTANT: Gold addresses are MEDIUM confidence — verify 0x1F04-06 live before using for payouts
verification_method: Open RetroArch memory viewer, start new game, earn first gold from selling crops, confirm 0x1F04-06 changes accordingly
name: Harvest Moon
